query_title: BARDO, False Chronicle of a Handful of Truths

recommendations.title: Amores Perros
recommendations.overview: A fatalistic car crash in Mexico city sets off a chain of events in the lives of three people: a supermodel, a young man wanting to run off with his sister-in-law, and a homeless man.

recommendations.title: 21 Grams

recommendations.title: September 11
recommendations.overview: An anthology of short films inspired by the events of the September 11 World Trade Center attacks.

recommendations.title: Rain Man
recommendations.overview: When car dealer Charlie Babbitt learns that his estranged father has died, he returns home to Cincinnati, where he discovers that he has a savant older brother named Raymond and that his father's $3 million fortune is being left to the mental institu

recommendations.title: Manchester by the Sea
recommendations.overview: After his older brother passes away, Lee Chandler is forced to return home to care for his 16-year-old nephew. There he is compelled to deal with a tragic past that separated him from his family and the community where he was born and raised.

recommendations.title: Cobain: Montage of Heck

recommendations.title: Crimes and Misdemeanors
recommendations.overview: A renowned ophthalmologist is desperate to cut off an adulterous relationship…which ends up in murder; and a frustrated documentary filmmaker woos an attractive television producer while making a film about her insufferably self-centered boss.

recommendations.title: Malcolm & Marie
recommendations.overview: As a filmmaker and his girlfriend return home from his movie premiere, smoldering tensions and painful revelations push them toward a romantic reckoning.

recommendations.title: C'mon C'mon
recommendations.overview: Johnny and his young nephew forge a tenuous but transformational relationship when they embark on a cross-country trip to see life away from Los Angeles.
